description: Tracks Claude session state in tmux pane variables

SessionStart.command: sh -c 'id=$(jq -r ".session_id"); dir=$(jq -r ".cwd"); timestamp=$(date +%s); [ -n "$TMUX" ] && tmux set-option -pt "$TMUX_PANE" @meta.claude.session_id "$id" && tmux set-option -pt "$TMUX_PANE" @meta.claude.session_id_set_on "SessionStart" && tmux set-option -pt "$TMUX_PANE" @meta.claude.session_dir "$dir" && tmux set-option -pt "$TMUX_PANE" @meta.claude.status "stopped" && tmux set-option -pt "$TMUX_PANE" @meta.claude.latest_hook_event "SessionStart" && tmux set-option -pt "$TMUX_PANE" @meta.claude.latest_hook_time "$timestamp" || exit 0'

SessionEnd.command: sh -c 'id=$(jq -r ".session_id"); timestamp=$(date +%s); [ -n "$TMUX" ] && tmux set-option -pt "$TMUX_PANE" @meta.claude.session_id "$id" && tmux set-option -pt "$TMUX_PANE" @meta.claude.session_id_set_on "SessionEnd" && tmux set-option -pt "$TMUX_PANE" -u @meta.claude.status && tmux set-option -pt "$TMUX_PANE" @meta.claude.latest_hook_event "SessionEnd" && tmux set-option -pt "$TMUX_PANE" @meta.claude.latest_hook_time "$timestamp" || exit 0'

Stop.command: sh -c 'id=$(jq -r ".session_id"); timestamp=$(date +%s); [ -n "$TMUX" ] && tmux set-option -pt "$TMUX_PANE" @meta.claude.session_id "$id" && tmux set-option -pt "$TMUX_PANE" @meta.claude.session_id_set_on "Stop" && tmux set-option -pt "$TMUX_PANE" @meta.claude.status "stopped" && tmux set-option -pt "$TMUX_PANE" @meta.claude.latest_hook_event "Stop" && tmux set-option -pt "$TMUX_PANE" @meta.claude.latest_hook_time "$timestamp" || exit 0'

UserPromptSubmit.command: sh -c 'id=$(jq -r ".session_id"); timestamp=$(date +%s); [ -n "$TMUX" ] && tmux set-option -pt "$TMUX_PANE" @meta.claude.session_id "$id" && tmux set-option -pt "$TMUX_PANE" @meta.claude.session_id_set_on "UserPromptSubmit" && tmux set-option -pt "$TMUX_PANE" @meta.claude.status "running" && tmux set-option -pt "$TMUX_PANE" @meta.claude.latest_hook_event "UserPromptSubmit" && tmux set-option -pt "$TMUX_PANE" @meta.claude.latest_hook_time "$timestamp" || exit 0'

PostToolUse.command: sh -c 'timestamp=$(date +%s); [ -n "$TMUX" ] && tmux set-option -pt "$TMUX_PANE" @meta.claude.status "running" && tmux set-option -pt "$TMUX_PANE" @meta.claude.latest_hook_event "PostToolUse" && tmux set-option -pt "$TMUX_PANE" @meta.claude.latest_hook_time "$timestamp" || exit 0'

Notification.command: sh -c 'notif_type=$(jq -r ".notification_type // \"unknown\""); timestamp=$(date +%s); event_name="Notification-${notif_type}"; if [[ "$notif_type" == "permission_prompt" || "$notif_type" == "elicitation_dialog" || "$notif_type" == "idle_prompt" ]]; then [ -n "$TMUX" ] && tmux set-option -pt "$TMUX_PANE" @meta.claude.status "stopped" && tmux set-option -pt "$TMUX_PANE" @meta.claude.latest_hook_event "$event_name" && tmux set-option -pt "$TMUX_PANE" @meta.claude.latest_hook_time "$timestamp"; else [ -n "$TMUX" ] && tmux set-option -pt "$TMUX_PANE" @meta.claude.latest_hook_event "$event_name" && tmux set-option -pt "$TMUX_PANE" @meta.claude.latest_hook_time "$timestamp"; fi || exit 0'

PreToolUse.command: sh -c 'timestamp=$(date +%s); [ -n "$TMUX" ] && tmux set-option -pt "$TMUX_PANE" @meta.claude.latest_hook_event "PreToolUse" && tmux set-option -pt "$TMUX_PANE" @meta.claude.latest_hook_time "$timestamp" || exit 0'

SubagentStop.command: sh -c 'id=$(jq -r ".session_id"); timestamp=$(date +%s); [ -n "$TMUX" ] && tmux set-option -pt "$TMUX_PANE" @meta.claude.session_id "$id" && tmux set-option -pt "$TMUX_PANE" @meta.claude.session_id_set_on "SubagentStop" && tmux set-option -pt "$TMUX_PANE" @meta.claude.latest_hook_event "SubagentStop" && tmux set-option -pt "$TMUX_PANE" @meta.claude.latest_hook_time "$timestamp" || exit 0'

PreCompact.command: sh -c 'timestamp=$(date +%s); [ -n "$TMUX" ] && tmux set-option -pt "$TMUX_PANE" @meta.claude.latest_hook_event "PreCompact" && tmux set-option -pt "$TMUX_PANE" @meta.claude.latest_hook_time "$timestamp" || exit 0'
